series_metadata.series_description: Documents complaints or queries submitted by civilians or local law enforcement to the Ohio Organized Crime Investigations Commission (OOCIC) concerning criminal activity. Complaints are often used to determine if an investigative task force should be started. Records include, but are not limited to, a civilian complaint form, correspondence with local law enforcement, related or responsive documentation provided by the complainant, and any responses made by the OOCIC.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: closure or rejection. ; Paper: closure or rejection, unless scanned and saved electronically
